Contents 
  1. Description

Interface RegistryBuilder<T>

Type Parameters:
T - registry value type
All Known Subinterfaces:
BannerPatternRegistryEntry.Builder, CatTypeRegistryEntry.Builder, ChickenVariantRegistryEntry.Builder, CowVariantRegistryEntry.Builder, DamageTypeRegistryEntry.Builder, DialogRegistryEntry.Builder, EnchantmentRegistryEntry.Builder, FrogVariantRegistryEntry.Builder, GameEventRegistryEntry.Builder, InstrumentRegistryEntry.Builder, JukeboxSongRegistryEntry.Builder, PaintingVariantRegistryEntry.Builder, PigVariantRegistryEntry.Builder, SoundEventRegistryEntry.Builder, WolfVariantRegistryEntry.Builder, ZombieNautilusVariantRegistryEntry.Builder
@Experimental @NullMarked @NonExtendable public interface RegistryBuilder<T>
To be implemented by any type used for modifying registries.
